description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a landscaped yard with numerous evenly spaced trees. The building features a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, with large windows distributed along the longer facades, allowing for ample natural light. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch area, and the structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco with glass elements. The property is set within a clear, open lot, with the trees forming a loose perimeter around the house. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal proportions. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard surrounded by trees. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade with multiple large windows and a row of trees along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, small porch, and symmetrical window arrangement flanked by trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the extended length of the bungalow and the dense tree arrangement on one side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back facade with fewer windows and a more open yard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
